moments.title: Lionel Richie turns 77!
moments.blurb: The legendary singer-songwriter, known for hits like 'Hello' and 'All Night Long', celebrates his 77th birthday today.

angles.name: Feel-good throwback
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to the one and only Lionel Richie! What’s your go-to track when you need some Commodores or solo-era magic?

angles.name: Quiz / Fact
angles.copy: Today marks Lionel Richie’s 77th birthday! Did you know he wrote Kenny Rogers' massive hit 'Lady' before his huge solo career?

moments.title: Sir Paul McCartney's 84th
moments.blurb: Music icon Sir Paul McCartney celebrated his 84th birthday on June 18th, still performing and inspiring generations worldwide.

angles.name: Legendary status
angles.copy: Still buzzing from Sir Paul McCartney's 84th birthday on Thursday! What's your favourite Beatles or Wings track penned by Macca?

angles.name: Influence
angles.copy: 84 years young! Paul McCartney's songwriting genius changed music forever. What's a McCartney lyric that always sticks with you?

moments.title: Lana Del Rey turns 41
moments.blurb: The acclaimed singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey, known for her cinematic and melancholic style, celebrates her 41st birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Birthday anticipation
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Tomorrow, Lana Del Rey turns 41. Which of her iconic tracks will you be spinning to mark the occasion?

angles.name: Artistic impact
angles.copy: Lana Del Rey's 41st birthday is tomorrow. From 'Video Games' to 'Summertime Sadness', her unique sound has defined an era. What's your favourite Lana vibe?

moments.title: Summer Solstice tomorrow
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the longest day and shortest night of the year in the Northern Hemisphere, occurs tomorrow, Sunday June 21st, at 9:24 AM BST.

angles.name: Longest day celebration
angles.copy: The Summer Solstice is officially tomorrow! Get ready for the longest day of the year and all those extra hours of daylight. How will you be making the most of it?

angles.name: Stonehenge connection
angles.copy: Tomorrow is the Summer Solstice! Thousands will gather at Stonehenge to greet the sunrise on the longest day of the year. Are you an early riser for the solstice?

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 begins
moments.blurb: The prestigious Wimbledon Championships 2026 are set to begin on Monday, June 29th, with two weeks of world-class tennis at the All England Club.

angles.name: Anticipation for tennis
angles.copy: Only 9 days to go until Wimbledon 2026 kicks off! Who are you backing for the men's and women's singles titles this year?

angles.name: Strawberries and cream
angles.copy: Dust off your tennis whites! Wimbledon 2026 starts on June 29th. Get ready for two weeks of thrilling matches, strawberries, and cream!

moments.title: Lexus Eastbourne Open ongoing
moments.blurb: The Lexus Eastbourne International tennis tournament is currently underway, running from June 20th to 27th, as a key warm-up event for Wimbledon.

angles.name: Live tennis action
angles.copy: Live tennis action is heating up at the Lexus Eastbourne International! Who are you keeping an eye on for a strong run before Wimbledon?

moments.title: HSBC Championships at Queen's
moments.blurb: The HSBC Championships at Queen's Club, a major grass-court tennis event, concludes tomorrow, June 21st, in London.

angles.name: Tennis final buzz
angles.copy: It's the penultimate day at the HSBC Championships at Queen's Club! Who do you predict will lift the trophy in London tomorrow?

moments.title: Ariana Grande turns 33
moments.blurb: Pop superstar Ariana Grande, known for her incredible vocal range and chart-topping hits, will celebrate her 33rd birthday on June 26th.

angles.name: Birthday countdown
angles.copy: Counting down to Ariana Grande's 33rd birthday on June 26th! What's your ultimate Ariana anthem?

moments.title: John Taylor (Duran Duran) turns 66
moments.blurb: John Taylor, the iconic bassist of new wave legends Duran Duran, celebrates his 66th birthday today.

angles.name: Duran Duran tribute
angles.copy: Happy 66th Birthday to Duran Duran's legendary bassist, John Taylor! What's your favourite Duran Duran hit to get you dancing?

moments.title: Mick Fleetwood turns 79
moments.blurb: Mick Fleetwood, the co-founder and drummer of the legendary band Fleetwood Mac, will celebrate his 79th birthday on June 24th.

angles.name: Fleetwood Mac drum beat
angles.copy: On June 24th, we celebrate Mick Fleetwood's 79th birthday! The powerhouse drummer behind Fleetwood Mac. What's your top Mac track?

moments.title: Mick Jones (The Clash) turns 71
moments.blurb: Mick Jones, guitarist and co-founder of punk rock pioneers The Clash, celebrates his 71st birthday on June 26th.

angles.name: Punk rock icon
angles.copy: Happy 71st Birthday to Mick Jones of The Clash on June 26th! What's the ultimate Clash anthem for you?

moments.title: Chris Isaak turns 70
moments.blurb: The distinctive voice behind 'Wicked Game', Chris Isaak, will celebrate his 70th birthday on June 26th.

angles.name: Timeless crooner
angles.copy: Happy 70th Birthday to Chris Isaak on June 26th! That voice, those songs. What's your favourite Chris Isaak moment?

moments.title: Patty Smyth (Scandal) turns 69
moments.blurb: Patty Smyth, lead singer of the 80s rock band Scandal and successful solo artist, celebrates her 69th birthday on June 26th.

angles.name: 80s rock icon
angles.copy: Wishing a rockin' 69th Birthday to Patty Smyth of Scandal on June 26th! What's your favourite track from the 'Warrior' herself?

moments.title: UK Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: It's Friday, which means a new Official UK Singles Chart is out today, revealing the nation's most popular tracks.

angles.name: Chart reveal
angles.copy: The new Official UK Singles Chart is out! Who's made it to Number 1 this week? Any surprises in the Top 10?

angles.name: New music discussion
angles.copy: Friday means chart day! What new tracks have climbed the Official UK Singles Chart this week? Any hot tips for future hits?
